title: 多 Agent 的代价：Token 消耗是单聊天的 15 倍
title_en: The Multi-Agent Tax: 15× Token Cost vs. Chat

body.problem: 多 Agent 系统性能更强，但代价高昂：单 Agent 任务约消耗聊天的 4 倍 token，多 Agent 系统则约消耗 15 倍。如果任务价值不够高，这种架构在经济上不可行。
body.solution: 将多 Agent 架构用于满足以下条件的任务：① 任务价值足够高，能覆盖成本；② 存在大量真正可并行的子任务；③ 信息量超出单个上下文窗口；④ 需要与众多复杂工具交互。反之，**不适合**的场景包括：所有 Agent 需要共享同一上下文、Agent 间存在大量顺序依赖（如大多数编程任务）。
body.keyTakeaway: 多 Agent 是一种性能放大器，不是万能药。用在对的问题上，收益巨大；用错了，只是烧钱。

body_en.problem: Multi-agent systems are powerful but expensive: single-agent tasks use about 4× more tokens than chat, and multi-agent systems use about 15×. If the task value doesn't justify the cost, this architecture isn't economically viable.
body_en.solution: Reserve multi-agent architectures for tasks that: ① have high enough value to justify the cost; ② involve heavily parallelizable subtasks; ③ require information exceeding a single context window; ④ need to interface with many complex tools. Avoid for tasks where all agents must share context or where there are many sequential dependencies between agents (most coding tasks fall here).
body_en.keyTakeaway: Multi-agent is a performance amplifier, not a universal solution. Applied to the right problems, the gains are massive. Applied to the wrong ones, it just burns tokens.
